nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-throated solitaire
nodes.summary: Rufous-throated solitaire（Rufous-throated solitaire，学名 Myadestes genibarbis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Vincent The rufous-throated solitaire primarily inhabits dense, moist, lowland and montane evergreen forest in the tropical zone, from sea level to . It also occurs in groves along streams that traverse meadows

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. A 2003 field guide considered it fairly common throughout its range. It remains fairly common in the Dominican Republic but is much reduced in Haiti due to habitat destruction
